theme_and_archetype.vibe: Authority, clarity, truth. Apple-level minimalism combined with Notion-like data density.
theme_and_archetype.core_philosophy: Color exists only to guide action. 95% of the UI should be structural grayscale. High density where needed (company details), generous breathing room between major frame sections.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium

layout_and_spacing.frame_container: h-screen w-full snap-y snap-mandatory overflow-y-scroll scroll-smooth
layout_and_spacing.frame_section: h-screen w-full snap-start flex flex-col justify-center relative p-8 md:p-16 lg:p-24

grid_system.dashboard_mode: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Neumorphic 'Clay & Crisp' for dashboard widgets: flat #FAFAFA background, 1px #E4E4E7 border, subtle ambient shadow. No pure transparent overlays without blur.

ui_components.buttons: Sharp corners or subtle 4px radius. High contrast. Primary uses #0055FF with white text. Hover states must explicitly define text color.
ui_components.cards: Cardless or strictly rectangular flat borders. No massive drop shadows. Use 1px solid stroke (border-zinc-200) to define edges.
ui_components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (z-50). Vertical sticky dot-navigation for the 10-frame Company Detail page.
ui_components.forms_and_filters: Shadcn/UI components heavily customized to look flat, dense, and Notion-like. No native inputs.
ui_components.charts: Shadcn chart components (Recharts). Accessible monochrome or high-contrast brand color palettes.

rules: Scroll-triggered subtle fade-in-up for content inside frames.
Micro-interactions on hover (slight lift -translate-y-0.5, border darken).

media_and_images.strategy: Images should act as atmospheric background plates or structural visual anchors. Never generic stock.
media_and_images.overlay_rule: Max overlay opacity bg-white/40 over images. Text must use drop-shadow if contrast is borderline.

hero_background.description: Minimalist Apple-style abstract 3D composition with frosted glass. Use as the main background for the Home Hero Frame.

tech_detail.description: Sleek tech device macro photography. Use for the 'Tech Giants' category tile or Technology Frame background.

modern_office.description: Contemporary glass building facade. Use for the 'Enterprise/Corporate' category or Company Overview frames.

abstract_data.description: Abstract white wavy lines on soft background. Use as a subtle texture for the Analytics Dashboard or Skill Mapping Tool frame.

strictly_enforced: There is ONE database table: public.company.
Map UI fields EXACTLY 1:1 to columns. Do not rename, combine, or invent fields.
No hardcoded mock data for the UI rendering. The app must scale from 1 to 1000+ companies dynamically.
PWA setup is mandatory: service worker, offline fallback, installable.
data_and_architecture_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing heavily on the CSS snap-scroll architecture first to ensure the 'Frame-by-Frame' requirement works perfectly.
Use the provided image_urls for visual anchors as requested in the 'Visual Intelligence' directive.
Integrate Shadcn primitives heavily for the Notion-like density in the 10-frame Company Details view.
Ensure the Excel ingestion logic dynamically creates PostgreSQL columns matching the Excel headers exactly via Supabase.
Apply the Light Theme + Archetype 4 design tokens rigidly. Avoid adding unrequested colors. Stick to high-contrast monochrome with blue accents.
